reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 우리애들이 이거만 들면 진짜 환장을 해요ㅜㅜㅋㅋ특히 둘째가ㅠㅜ 근데 다른데선 전혀 찾을수가 없고 바잇미에서만 팔더라구요 지난번에 품절떠서 한참 기다렸어가지고 재고있을때 왕창 쟁여놨어요 솜방망이 이렇게 많이 사둬도 워낙 격하게 반응을 해서 금방 사망ㅠㅜ없으면 안되는 장난감입니다 제가 놀아줘도 잘 갖고놀지만 혼자서도 잘 가지고 놀아요 ㅋㅋ 그런데 제품상태가 일정하진않아요..어떤건 털이 풍성하고 어떤건 빈약해요 개선되면 좋긴 하겠어요
reviews.content_en: My kids go absolutely crazy for this one ㅜㅜㅋㅋ especially the second one ㅠㅜ But I can't find it anywhere else—only BITE ME sells it. It was out of stock last time and I waited forever, so I stocked up big time when it came back in. Even though I bought so many of these pom-pom toys, they react so intensely that they get destroyed pretty fast ㅠㅜ It's a must-have toy. My kids play with it when I engage them, but they also play with it on their own ㅋㅋ That said, the product quality isn't consistent... some have really fluffy fur and some look sparse. It would be great if that could be improved.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 반응이 아주 좋아요! 금방 질려하는 아이라 얼마나 갈지 모르겠지만ㅠ 그래도 아직까진 잘 놀아주네요:)
reviews.content_en: The reaction is really great! My pup gets bored pretty easily so I'm not sure how long it'll last ㅠ but still playing with it well so far :)

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 좋아해요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 이렇게 생긴 덩어리를 잘 갖고놀길래 스틱형 구매했능데 역시 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: They love it ㅎㅎㅎㅎ Since they played so well with the chunky kind, I bought the stick version too and they love that one just as much

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 잘라서 저거뭐냐 자동 장난감에 꽂아줬더니 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: I cut it up and stuck it in one of those automatic toy dispensers and they love it

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 아니 예상했던거 보다 훨씬 잘놀아요 ㅋㅋㅋ 공처럼 물고다니기도 하고 발로도 차고 핥아주고 난리예용ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Wow, they play with it way more than I expected ㅋㅋㅋ They carry it around like a ball, kick it with their paws, lick it—it's total chaos ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 모야모야 가격대비 최고~ 다른제품사면서 그냥 하나껴서 샀는데 냥이들이 엄청 조아해요~~~
reviews.content_en: Moya moya, best value for the price~ I just grabbed one while buying other stuff and the kitties absolutely love it~~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저렴하게 구입해봤는데 집사의 운동량도 도와주는 아이템이네여ㅋㅋ 깨작깨작 놀아주기는 죠아횽ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Got it for a good price and it's actually helping the human get some exercise too ㅋㅋ Love watching them play and pounce ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 오뎅꼬치 사랑은 변하지 않네요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: So cute! The love for odeng-skewer toys never changes ㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 털이 조금 빠지지만 잘 가지고 놀아용
reviews.content_en: The fur sheds a bit but they play with it well

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: The toy kept getting destroyed so I bought a new one
